name: Building Automation System (BAS) Hijack
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of smart building automation systems targeting HVAC, access control, lighting, and fire suppression via BACnet/KNX protocols
root_objective: Hijack building automation systems to disrupt or weaponise facility operations

nodes.title: Hijack Building Automation System
nodes.description: Gain control of BAS to manipulate HVAC, access control, lighting, fire suppression, or elevator systems

nodes.title: Access BAS Control Network
nodes.description: Gain network-level access to the BACnet/LonWorks/KNX control network

nodes.title: Exploit BACnet/IP on Shared VLAN
nodes.description: BAS controllers often share network segments with corporate IT; BACnet/IP is unauthenticated by default

nodes.title: Compromise BAS Web Interface
nodes.description: Exploit default credentials or vulnerabilities in web-based BAS management dashboards

nodes.title: Physical Access to BAS Controller
nodes.description: Access a BAS controller in a utility closet or above-ceiling to connect directly to the control bus

nodes.title: Manipulate HVAC Systems
nodes.description: Alter heating, ventilation, and cooling to cause discomfort, equipment damage, or server room overheating

nodes.title: Disable Cooling to Server Rooms
nodes.description: Turn off CRAC units serving server rooms to cause thermal shutdowns

nodes.title: Override Thermostat Setpoints
nodes.description: Set heating to maximum or cooling to minimum across occupied floors

nodes.title: Compromise Access Control System
nodes.description: Manipulate electronic door locks, badge readers, and access policies

nodes.title: Unlock Secure Doors Remotely
nodes.description: Override door lock commands to grant access to restricted areas (server rooms, executive floors)

nodes.title: Lock All Doors During Emergency
nodes.description: Override fire safety unlock protocols to trap occupants during a simulated or real emergency

nodes.title: Interfere with Fire Suppression
nodes.description: Disable or falsely trigger fire suppression systems

nodes.title: Disable Sprinkler Pre-Action System
nodes.description: Suppress the pre-action valve system so sprinklers fail to activate during a real fire

nodes.title: Trigger False Fire Suppression
nodes.description: Activate gaseous fire suppression (FM-200/Novec) in occupied areas to displace oxygen
